utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully specified with the appropriate details: (1) 'property' includes type, price, currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, location, features, size, viewing date, and move-in date; (2) 'financing' includes method, total cost, currency, down payment, fees, and approval timeline; (3) 'legal_services' includes package name, cost, currency, and services included; (4) 'moving_services' includes level, cost, currency, services included, and flexibility; (5) 'setup_services' includes utility package, cost, currency, services included, timeline, and integration; (6) 'total_budget' includes property cost, individual service costs, total, currency, and completion target. All fields are present and detailed, so every item in the format is covered fully.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a townhouse purchase for CAD 750,000 in east_end Toronto with features such as a double garage, private garden, and character home. In the ground truth, the only purchase property priced at CAD $750K and described as a character or historic townhouse is 'Historic Townhouse', which has a rating of 6. The financing method chosen was 'cash_purchase', matching 'Cash Purchase' in the purchase_financing section with a rating of 4. The legal service package used was 'Premium Legal Package', which has a rating of 9. The moving service level 'premium' corresponds to 'Premium Moving' with a rating of 9. The setup services used the 'premium' utility package costing 280 CAD, matching 'Premium Utilities' with a rating of 9.
